title: RuneForge
description: RuneForge is a modpack designed for the RuneForged server, a lore-rich multiplayer world with a full economy. Built around mods like Irons Spells and Spellbooks, Create, and Immersive Engineering, it blends fantasy magic with advanced machinery.
body:
![RuneForged Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/RuneForge/BH_RuneF_header.webp) RuneForge is a captivating Minecraft modpack designed for the RuneForged server! Build, Explore, Fight, And Trade! a lore-rich multiplayer world with a full economy. Built around popular mods like Irons Spells and Spellbooks, Create, Origins, and Immersive Engineering, RuneForge merges the mystical allure of fantasy with the ingenuity of engineering. Players can collaborate and compete in a richly detailed world where ancient magic meets advanced machinery. Build monumental structures, craft powerful spell books, and harness the elements to shape your environment. Whether you're forging alliances or battling for dominance, RuneForge offers an immersive and dynamic experience that challenges your creativity and strategic thinking. Dive into a realm where the only limit is your imagination! ![https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/RuneForge/BH_RuneF_features.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/RuneForge/BH_RuneF_features.webp) ## Features - **Irons Spells and Spellbooks:** Unleash ancient magic to shape your destiny - **Create:** Engineer intricate contraptions and marvel at your creations - **Origins:** Choose from a variety of unique origins, each with its own abilities and perks - **Immersive Engineering:** Build massive machines and automate your world ![RuneForged Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5ZvYEq0V/images/e519e779f219a66b01c7e6cccde3b949d2efc6a2.png) Experience RuneForge: Embrace the challenge of mastering both ancient magic and cutting-edge technology as you embark on a quest for supremacy, creativity, and adventure. Forge alliances, build civilizations, and leave an indelible mark on the ever-evolving world of RuneForge. *Sponsored by Bisect Hosting* [![Bisect](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/RuneForge/BH_RuneF_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/watermelonfrogy) Bisect Hosting has been a loyal partner since our studio was in its early stages. Despite our strong loyalty, we maintain unbiased opinions and always share genuine experiences. Bisect's servers have consistently provided outstanding performance, and their support is unmatched in the industry.
Badges
